pra-√1. dhā Ā. -dhatte, to place or set before, offer,  RV. ;
to send out (spies),  ib.  vii, 61, 3 ;
to give up, deliver,  TS. ;  Kāṭh. ;
to devote one's self to (acc.),  Lalit.
